textByHash.a69da962b1606fb2f63c64213c92eb6da3e954ca: That is very very kind of you, how do I get out?
textByHash.d09ebf8c540f0de2ce84e5fc68ca1939afcb6756: Thank you my friend, I must leave you now. My father will pay you well for this.
textByHash.9ab8204efdebe4b8721c2bf63bae183a13de2c98: I owe you my life for that escape. You cannot help me this time, they know who you are. Go in peace, friend of Al-Kharid.
textByHash.2a916cddb44062158ff51584e17c793d5245d85e: Oh thank goodness! What's your plan?
textByHash.2ccf493e59fbc843709f673b57269b00cca9142a: Thank you, my friend. I must leave you now, but my father will pay you well for this.
textByHash.c3bd2158e69c102b1465051231bba0cf9011ff54: Good to see you, friend. I am forever in your debt for what you did, as is all of Al Kharid.
textByHash.68fc9c1d2a9c527f26389e4985a433edb8ea3c01: I know my father is very grateful as well. If he were in better health, he would have thanked you personally. However, at his age, it is best that he spends his time resting.
